creator: oleg@vsi.ru
text:
I have the problem with the same symptoms on SMP FreeBSD 6.2-STABLE with 
dual AMD Opteron(tm) Processor 850. Sometimes (apparently when CPU load 
suddenly goes up) all processes that interacts with disk gets stuck in "ufs" 
state, but in my case SIGSTOP/SIGCONT seemingly does not help.

uname -a output:

FreeBSD serv2.vsi.ru 6.2-STABLE FreeBSD 6.2-STABLE #2: Sat Mar  3 01:59:08 
MSK 2007     oleg@serv2.vsi.ru:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/serv2  i386
